## Checklist

- [ ] Frontend module/workspace boundaries are respected (`apps/`, `packages/`)
- [ ] No unrelated files are included
- [ ] UI/UX, props, or state behavior changes are documented
- [ ] Assets (Godot exports, images) are committed or not needed
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits
